about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a Frontend Developer with hands-on experience in React.js, JavaScript, and modern frontend tools. I specialize in responsive design, state management, and API integration, always aiming for scalable, pixel-perfect interfaces that align with brand identity.

bio.title: The Person Behind The Code
bio.para1: Hi, I'm Ratnesh. I sit at the intersection of design and engineering. My philosophy is simple: technology should be invisible, and experiences should be unforgettable.
bio.para2: With over 8 years of experience shipping production-grade software, I've learned that the secret to great products isn't just clean code or pretty pixels—it's how they work together to solve real human problems.

0.title: Performance First
0.description: Speed is a feature. I prioritize efficient code, optimized assets, and smooth 60fps animations to ensure every interaction feels instantaneous.

1.title: Pixel Perfection
1.description: Details matter. From consistent spacing to perfect typography, I obsess over the small things that elevate a product from good to great.

2.title: User-Centric
2.description: Empathy drives my design decisions. I build accessible, inclusive interfaces that work for everyone, regardless of device or ability.

3.title: Scalable Architecture
3.description: I write clean, modular, and maintainable code. Building systems that can grow and evolve without accumulating technical debt.

hero.description: I'm Ratnesh, a developer who believes that the best code is invisible, and the best experiences are unforgettable. I sit at the intersection of design and engineering.

learning.title: Continuous Learning

hero.title: Services
hero.subtitle: Transforming ideas into digital reality through specialized expertise.

web-design.title: Web Design
web-design.description: Crafting visually stunning and user-centric interfaces that tell your brand's story.
web-design.detailedDescription: I believe that design is not just about how things look, but how they work. My web design process involves deep research into your brand and users, followed by iterative wireframing and high-fidelity prototyping. I focus on creating emotional connections through aesthetics, typography, and layout.

development.title: Development
development.description: Building robust, scalable, and performant web applications using modern technologies.
development.detailedDescription: I translate designs into pixel-perfect code. specialized in the React ecosystem (Next.js), I build fast, accessible, and SEO-friendly applications. I pay attention to code quality, performance optimization, and maintainability.

motion.title: Motion & Branding
motion.description: Adding life and identity to digital products through purposeful motion and interaction.
motion.detailedDescription: Motion is the secret ingredient that makes a digital product feel alive. I use libraries like GSAP and Framer Motion to create smooth transitions, micro-interactions, and immersive scroll effects that guide the user and enhance the experience.

strategy.title: Digital Strategy
strategy.description: Aligning digital solutions with business goals to drive growth and engagement.
strategy.detailedDescription: Before a single line of code is written, we need a plan. I help define the digital strategy, identifying the target audience, key performance indicators, and the best technical approach to achieve your business objectives.

hero.description: Whether you have a game-changing idea or just want to see if we're a good fit, my inbox is open.

discovery.title: 1. Discovery
discovery.desc: We discuss your goals, requirements, and vision for the project.

proposal.title: 2. Proposal
proposal.desc: I provide a detailed roadmap, timeline, and quote for approval.

kickoff.title: 3. Kickoff
kickoff.desc: Development begins with regular updates and feedback loops.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project context, timeline, and goals...
form.successDesc: Thanks for reaching out! I'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email directly.

availability.a: I am generally available for new projects within 1-2 weeks. For urgent requests, please mention it in the subject line.

pricing.q: Do you offer fixed-price or hourly rates?
pricing.a: I prefer fixed-price per project to keep budgets predictable, but I'm open to hourly retainers for long-term maintenance.

tech.q: What technologies do you specialize in?
tech.a: My core stack includes React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Node.js. I focus on building high-performance, accessible web applications.

existing.q: Can you help with existing projects?
existing.a: Absolutely! I can audit your current codebase, optimize performance, or add new features to an existing application.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.description: Transparency is key. Here's how I handle your data with care and respect.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.text: Welcome to my portfolio. I respect your privacy and am committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how I look after your personal data when you visit my website and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

data.title: 2. Data I Collect
data.text: I may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which I have grouped together follows:
list: Identity Data includes first name, last name, username or similar identifier.
Contact Data includes email address and telephone number (if provided via contact form).
Technical Data includes internet protocol (IP) address, your login data, browser type and version.

usage.title: 3. How I Use Your Data
usage.text: I will only use your personal data when the law allows me to. Most commonly, I will use your personal data in the following circumstances:
list: Where I need to respond to your inquiries sent via the contact form.
Where it is necessary for my legitimate interests and your rights do not override those interests.

contact.title: 4. Contact Me
contact.text: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or my privacy practices, please contact me at:

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.description: Please read these terms carefully before using my portfolio website.

agreement.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
agreement.text: By accessing this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

ip.title: 2. Intellectual Property
ip.text: Unless otherwise indicated, the Site is my proprietary property and all source code, designs, and content are owned or controlled by me.

reps.title: 3. User Representations
reps.text: By using the Site, you represent and warrant that you have the legal capacity and agree to comply with these terms.

limit.title: 4. Limitations
limit.text: In no event shall Ratnesh or its suppliers be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use the materials.

law.title: 5. Governing Law
law.text: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India.
